title: 東京大賞典の後に・あらがえぬ大渦

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Racing in the Tokyo Daishoten for the first time is
like being caught in a fierce whirlwind. Copano
Rickey and the others feel their passion get
swallowed up by the immense vortex.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today may not have gone to plan, but she is
determined to grow and try again next year.
